caption: The video captures a scene from a meeting of the House Committee on General, Housing, and Military Affairs, dated April 12, 2019, focusing on S.23, a bill to increase the minimum wage. A man with short gray hair, wearing glasses, is seated at a table and appears to be engaged in a discussion or presentation. He gestures with his right hand, holding a pencil, as he speaks. Behind him, a photographer stands ready with a camera, capturing the moment. The setting includes various items on the table such as a tissue box, a water bottle, and some documents, indicating a formal yet practical environment. Another person is partially visible, working on a laptop, suggesting that this is a professional and organized committee meeting.
